meaning: n.子午线,正午,顶点,全盛时期adj.子午线的,正午的,顶点的,全盛时期的
examples: Cormac McCarthy's Blood Meridian is a terrible book.
The violence in Blood Meridian is richly described and deeply imagined.
Tying it to the meridian, or any other natural benchmark, proved intractable.
Meridian and Crawford made respective gains in 2002 from market timing of 37% and 43%.
One of its most notable features is the tallest building in Wales, the 29-storey Meridian Tower.
